prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 66.6 kg; Height 154.2 cm; BMI 28.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.7%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 10.1%), FPG (12 months ago 234mg/dL; 9 months ago 320mg/dL; 6 months ago 307mg/dL; 3 months ago 269mg/dL; current 230mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.2kg; 9 months ago 62.9kg; 6 months ago 67.2kg; 3 months ago 67.7kg; current 66.6kg), Height (12 months ago 154.2cm; 9 months ago 154.2cm; 6 months ago 154.2cm; 3 months ago 154.2cm; current 154.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 28.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 82mmHg; 6 months ago 82mmHg; 3 months ago 82mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 55U/L; 9 months ago 49U/L; 6 months ago 55U/L; 3 months ago 50U/L; current 51U/L), AST (12 months ago 108U/L; 9 months ago 107U/L; 6 months ago 105U/L; 3 months ago 103U/L; current 107U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 9.4mL/min/1.73m²; current 7mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 263mg/g; 9 months ago 386mg/g; 6 months ago 293mg/g; 3 months ago 305mg/g; current 427mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 85mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 39mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 153mg/dL; 9 months ago 151mg/dL; 6 months ago 170mg/dL; 3 months ago 151mg/dL; current 159mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 10.0g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
